title: BEM-741 fresh Claude trigger
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/autonomy','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 15:28 (UTC+3)'
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem741_fresh_trigger_after_lint_repair.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-741 | FRESH CLAUDE TRIGGER AFTER LINT REPAIR'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: RUNTIME_PROOF_AND_RESPONSE_REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Claude, this request is sent after repairing workflow-lint issues and adding the workflow_run bridge.'+sep+sep+'Required output file: `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem741_claude_response.md`.'+sep+sep+'Answer:'+sep+'1. Did the inbound Claude workflow start successfully?'+sep+'2. Why did prior GPT-to-Claude mailbox files not produce a response?'+sep+'3. Final decision for multi-agent architecture v2.1: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+sep+'Required format:'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-741 | CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Inbound runtime status: ...'+sep+'Why no previous response: ...'+sep+'Blocking reason: null / ...'+sep+'Required fix: ...'+sep+'Final recommendation: ...'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
watch=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(watch.read_text(errors='ignore')) if watch.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
data.update({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v6','active':True,'run_id':'bem741_after_lint_repair','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','watch_scope':'BEM-741 BEM-732 BEM-728 BEM-725','operator_role':'none','kicked_at':created})
watch.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'schema_version':'fresh_claude_trigger_after_lint_repair.v1','bem':'BEM-741','status':'fresh_gpt_to_claude_trigger_written','mailbox_file':str(mail),'watchdog_active':str(watch),'operator_role':'none','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem741_fresh_claude_trigger_after_lint_repair.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem741_fresh_claude_trigger_after_lint_repair.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-741 | Fresh Claude Trigger After Lint Repair | SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Fresh GPT-to-Claude trigger written after workflow repair.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem741_fresh_claude_trigger_after_lint_repair','status':'fresh_gpt_to_claude_trigger_written','mailbox_file':str(mail),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem741_fresh_claude_trigger_after_lint_repair.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-741 SENT: fresh GPT-to-Claude trigger after lint repair.\n')
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-741 FRESH CLAUDE TRIGGER SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Watch Claude runtime state and claude_to_gpt response. Do not stop after report.'+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(mail),str(watch),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof),'governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md'])
ops_applied.append('Sent fresh GPT-to-Claude trigger after lint repair and kept minute watchdog active')
